jaxlibxc
  • API Reference
  • GGA Functionals
  • View page source

GGA Functionals

Generalized Gradient Approximation functional implementations.

PBE Exchange

PBE exchange functional and variants.

Translated from maple/gga_exc/gga_x_pbe.mpl.

PBE enhancement factor: F(s) = 1 + kappa - kappa / (1 + mu*s^2/kappa) where s = X2S * x_sigma (reduced gradient per spin).

References

Perdew, Burke, Ernzerhof, PRL 77, 3865 (1996)

Becke 88 Exchange

Becke 88 exchange functional.

Translated from maple/gga_exc/gga_x_b88.mpl.

F(x) = 1 + beta/X_FACTOR_C * x^2 / (1 + gamma*beta*x*arcsinh(x))

References

Becke, Phys. Rev. A 38, 3098 (1988)

PBE Correlation

PBE correlation functional.

Translated from maple/gga_exc/gga_c_pbe.mpl. Includes PW92 LDA correlation as base, adds gradient correction.

E_c^PBE = E_c^PW(rs, z) + H(rs, z, t)

References

Perdew, Burke, Ernzerhof, PRL 77, 3865 (1996)

Lee-Yang-Parr Correlation

Lee-Yang-Parr (LYP) GGA correlation functional.

Translated from maple/gga_exc/gga_c_lyp.mpl.

References

Lee, Yang, Parr, Phys. Rev. B 37, 785 (1988) Miehlich, Savin, Stoll, Preuss, CPL 157, 200 (1989)

Mixed GGA Functionals

Mixed/hybrid GGA functionals.

B3LYP, PBE0, B3PW91, and other hybrid GGA exchange-correlation functionals.
